description: Nordigen provides open banking account-information connectivity for accessing bank account data through PSD2 APIs. Its bank-account-data product and docs are now presented under GoCardless developer properties, while Nordigen-issued user secrets remain the basis for API access.
summary: nordigen.com exposes one developer integration surface: the Nordigen/Bank Account Data HTTP API for account information, authenticated with Bearer access tokens minted from Nordigen user secrets.
